title_en: 7. Playing with dice and playing chess
content_en: Playing with dice is h a r k , according to Amir al-Mu'mineen 'Ali (&), ,. who said: "Playing with two burning coals is dearer to me than playing with two dice."173 He would not greet people who were playing with dice.'74 The evidence for this prohibition is the words of the Messenger of AUah (g): - , "Whoever plays with dice, it is as if he were dipping his hand in the flesh and blood of a pig."175 Chess is also harim according to 'Ali (&), as was narrated from him by Ibn ~ u d b a h . ' ~ ~ He used to say concerning chess: "It is the gambling of the non-Arab~."'~~ According to another report: "It is a kind of gambling." 17' It was narrated that Maysarab ibn Habeeb said: " 'Ali ibn Abi ?[2lib (&) passed by some people who were playing chess and said: 'What are these images to which you are (so assiduously) devoted?'79 Holding a coal until it goes out is better for him than touching these.""80 It was narrated that 'Ammir ibn Abi 'Ammir said: " 'Ali (&) passed by a group of (the tribe) TaymAllah who were playing chess. He stood over them and said: 'Allah created you for something other than this. By Allah, were it not that it would set a precedent, I would hit your faces with it."'181 The evidence for this prohibition is that it is gambling, which is h a r h according to the Quran and by analogy.182
content_id: Bermain dadu adalah haram menurut Amirul Mukminin Ali radhiallahu anhu, yang berkata: "Bermain dengan dua bara api lebih aku sukai daripada bermain dengan dua dadu." Beliau tidak mengucapkan salam kepada orang-orang yang sedang bermain dadu. Dalil pengharaman ini adalah sabda Rasulullah shallallahu alaihi wa sallam: "Barangsiapa bermain dadu, seolah-olah ia mencelupkan tangannya ke dalam daging dan darah babi." Adapun catur, menurut Ali radhiallahu anhu juga haram, sebagaimana diriwayatkan darinya oleh Ibnu Qudhah. Beliau biasa menyebut catur sebagai: "Perjudian orang non-Arab." Menurut riwayat lain: "Ia adalah sejenis perjudian." Diriwayatkan bahwa Maysarah ibn Habib berkata: "Ali ibn Abi Thalib radhiallahu anhu melewati sekelompok orang yang sedang bermain catur dan berkata: 'Apakah patung-patung ini yang kalian tekuni dengan begitu serius? Memegang bara api sampai padam lebih baik baginya daripada menyentuh benda-benda ini.'" Diriwayatkan bahwa Ammar ibn Abi Ammar berkata: "Ali radhiallahu anhu melewati sekelompok orang dari suku Taym Allah yang sedang bermain catur. Beliau berdiri di hadapan mereka dan berkata: 'Allah menciptakan kalian untuk sesuatu yang lebih baik dari ini. Demi Allah, seandainya tidak akan menjadi preseden, niscaya aku akan memukul muka kalian dengannya.'" Dalil pengharaman ini adalah bahwa permainan tersebut termasuk dalam kategori perjudian, yang diharamkan berdasarkan Al-Quran dan qiyas. Ali radhiallahu anhu sangat tegas dalam mencegah segala bentuk perjudian dan permainan yang melalaikan umat dari ibadah dan kewajiban agama.
